query: UPDATE products SET slug = CONCAT('product-', id) WHERE slug = '-' OR slug = '' OR slug REGEXP '^-+$';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user AKK2AjLXvjySfzt.defe7b7a87b6 --database gjTAhmM88fiEhPinRVjKbV --execute UPDATE products SET slug = CONCAT('product-', id) WHERE slug = '-' OR slug = '' OR slug REGEXP '^-+$';
